topic: User Willingness Evidence — Pricing, Migration, Visibility, Retention, Data Exchange

citations.title: Lenny's Newsletter — Paid Subscriber Deep Dive (Growth In Reverse)

citations.title: Lenny's Newsletter — 1 Million Subscribers Milestone Post

citations.title: Lenny Rachitsky Podcast Revenue — CNBC

citations.title: Substack Average Paid Conversion Rate Analysis (Really Good Business Ideas)
citations.key_data: Median paid conversion: 3% (not 5-10% as Substack claims); tech niche: 8%; only 20% of publications exceed 5%

citations.title: Substack User and Revenue Statistics (Backlinko)

citations.title: Substack Revenue — Sacra Analysis
citations.key_data: Substack $45M ARR July 2025; 100,000 monetizing publications (April 2026); 17,000 with recurring paid income

citations.key_data: Twitter creator exodus 2022-2024; notable creators migrated to Substack; Notes feature launched April 2023 as Twitter alternative

citations.key_data: 75% course completion rate (May 2021 data); cohort model explanation

citations.title: 23andMe Bankruptcy and Genetic Data — NPR
citations.key_data: Chapter 11 filed March 23, 2025; 15M+ genetic profiles; TTAM acquired for $305M; 80% opted into research

citations.title: 23andMe Rise and Fall — Drug Discovery Trends
citations.key_data: GSK $300M deal 2018 for 5M customer data; stock lost 99.6% of value; failed drug discovery pivot

citations.title: Bankruptcy, Genetic Information, and Privacy — NEJM
citations.key_data: Federal law inadequate for genetic data in bankruptcy; privacy statement allowed transfer; users could not prevent data sale

citations.title: What Happens to Your Genetic Data if 23andMe Collapses — Harvard Gazette
citations.key_data: Privacy statements reserve right to transfer data in bankruptcy; 28 state AGs challenged the transfer

citations.title: Strava Revenue and Usage Statistics (Business of Apps)
citations.key_data: 135M users (2024); 180M (2025); $163.4M revenue (2024); $415M (2025); 2% paid penetration; 90% revenue from premium

citations.title: Strava Privacy Audit 2026 (Terms.law)
citations.key_data: Grade F (32/100); extensive data collection; default public activities; third-party sharing

citations.title: Strava Activity Privacy Controls (Strava Support)
citations.key_data: Default: activities public to 'Everyone'; opt-out for Heatmap/Metro; must opt-out, not opt-in for privacy
